review_notes: This entry is a redacted summary of the 8d61fd7 211 verifier output after PR #28 context projection hardening, not the raw runtime payload.
The API and worker containers reported image ai-platform:8d61fd7-context-projection-fixed with matching source revision labels and /app source markers before the smoke was recorded.

The reviewed summary omits credentials, DSNs, object locators, workspace paths, executor internals, storage locators, run identifiers, file identifiers, artifact identifiers, and personal workstation paths.
This smoke proves the context snapshot public summary fields required by the PR #28 verifier: input keys, memory policy source, long-term-memory flag, execution tier, and generated-at presence.

This evidence supports Foundation Alpha POC smoke only. It does not close production concurrency, Docker sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, runtime export, or release-evidence retention gates.
